name: prototype-to-product
description: Hardens a working prototype into a pre-release product. Ships a phased workflow — assess-prototype builds a HARDENING.md gap ledger, define-release-target sets the pre-release bar (extending SPEC.md if present) and prioritizes the ledger against it, convert-prototype works the ledger down one item per commit. Loads HARDENING.md at session start, re-injects the hardening standing rules each turn, and reminds before wrap-up to keep the ledger current. Activates only once a HARDENING.md exists.
